# vastdata_database (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)
- `path` (String)

### Optional

- `bucket_owner` (String) The user name who should own this bucket
- `policy_id` (Number) The ID of the view policy to associate with this database (the policy must contains the S3 protocol)
- `tenant_id` (Number) The tenant ID of the view policy which is associated with this database

### Read-Only

- `guid` (String) A unique guid given to the databse
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
